HomePage.subtitle: Strategic partnerships and technology consulting for advanced electronics and semiconductor industries.

features.search_desc: Technical finder with predictive part matches.

AboutPage.label: Swiss engineering precision
AboutPage.description:
At brückenbauer GmbH, we build bridges - between disciplines, sectors and borders.
Based in Switzerland since 2022, we combine extensive experience at the intersection of politics, administration, business, and innovation. Thanks to a broad network, we connect local expertise with a global perspective and support our clients in mastering complex challenges and unlocking new potential.
We connect, design and empower.

services.label: Services
services.title: Strategic and operational support
services.srv_01_copy: We support or manage projects that are geared towards achieving clear goals, and we provide our clients with sound advice.
services.srv_02_copy: We facilitate cooperation with authorities, business partners or other relevant bodies and efficiently bring together complex interests.
services.srv_03_copy: We identify growth opportunities, develop business models and support our clients in fully realizing their potential.
services.srv_04_copy: In the short term and for a defined period, we supplement our customers' teams with our know-how to bridge resource gaps or to successfully complete projects.

sequence.label: Operating sequence
sequence.title: From need definition to long-term support
sequence.step_1_copy: We support you in defining your needs and help you finding means and ways to implement your strategy and achieve your goals.
sequence.step_2_copy: We will create a detailed roadmap that includes all phases of the project and the measures to be implemented.
sequence.step_3_copy: We provide the necessary support and all related elements. We also advise you on your long-term strategy.

IndustriesPage.label: Application sectors
IndustriesPage.title: Application Sectors
IndustriesPage.description: Electronic components for every application - reliable, versatile, and individually developed. From idea to series production, we deliver the right components for every application. As a reliable distributor of high-quality electronic components, we offer more than an extensive portfolio. We understand the requirements of diverse industries and support our customers with suitable solutions - quickly, competently, and with maximum supply reliability.

ProductsPage.label: Component Portfolio 2025
ProductsPage.title: Product Groups
ProductsPage.description: Upper-category archive from the component portfolio. Select a dossier group to inspect product-level parts, imagery, and technical metadata.
